title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Alkem Laboratories Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Alkem Laboratories Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Alkem Laboratories Capital India are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Alkem Laboratories Capital India:
Alkem Laboratories Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
